de.name: Small e-commerce
de.description:
Kleinerer Onlinehändler mit eigenem Lager. Eigener Webshop ist
Hauptkanal, schlankes Team, Routine-Operations dominieren. Sauberer
ERP-Betrieb wichtiger als Wachstums-Skalierung.

emphasis.overview: Klares Sortiment + Zielgruppe — Boutique-Charakter durchziehen, kein Bauchladen.
emphasis.company: Logo + AGB-Footer für AB · LS · RG · Mahnung sauber aufsetzen — der Beleg ist die Visitenkarte.
emphasis.products: Kuratiertes Sortiment, klare Marge pro SKU. Lieber tief als breit.
emphasis.channels: Eigener Shop trägt 70-90% — Marktplätze nur als Add-on.
emphasis.logistics: Eigenes Lager, eigenes Picking, 1-2 Carrier. Versanderlebnis ist persönlich.
emphasis.systems: Wenige Schnittstellen — Shop, Buchhaltung, Versand-Etiketten reichen am Anfang.
emphasis.payment: 3-5 Provider reichen. Vorkasse + Klarna + PayPal als Standard.

tasks.title: Logo + Beleg-Footer
tasks.hint: Logo (SVG/PNG) + AGB-Footer für AB · LS · RG · Mahnung

tasks.title: Shop-Anbindung
tasks.hint: API-Keys/Webhook-URL vom eigenen Shop (Shopify · Woo · JTL · Magento)

tasks.title: Stammdaten-CSV
tasks.hint: Artikel + Bilder + Pflichtfelder shop-fähig vorbereiten

tasks.title: Versand + Etiketten-Drucker
tasks.hint: 1-2 Carrier (DHL/DPD/UPS) + Etiketten-Drucker für Pick & Pack

tasks.title: E-Mail-Vorlagen freigeben
tasks.hint: Order-Confirm · Versand · Retoure · Kundenanfrage

tasks.title: SMTP + SPF/DKIM
tasks.hint: Postfach + DNS-Records, damit Belege nicht im Spam landen

tasks.title: Bank-Login (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Tagesabgleich + OPOS-Matching automatisch

tasks.title: DATEV-Berater-Zugang
tasks.hint: Beraternr. + Mandantennr. an Steuerberater

tasks.title: Test-User Lager/Buchhaltung
tasks.hint: für rollenspezifische Schulung

tasks.title: Schulungstermine planen
tasks.hint: Pro Rolle 1 Session vor Go-Live reicht meist

tasks.title: Go-Live-Datum bestätigen
tasks.hint: Cut-Over-Wochenende · Freeze-Datum · 2 Wochen Hypercare

en.name: Small e-commerce
en.description:
Smaller online retailer with own warehouse. Own webshop is the
main channel, lean team, routine operations dominate. Clean ERP
operation matters more than growth scaling.

emphasis.overview: Clear range + target audience — keep boutique character through and through, no bargain bin.
emphasis.company: Set up logo + T&C footer for order confirmation · delivery note · invoice · dunning cleanly — the document is the business card.
emphasis.products: Curated range, clear margin per SKU. Better deep than broad.
emphasis.channels: Own shop carries 70-90% — marketplaces only as add-on.
emphasis.logistics: Own warehouse, own picking, 1-2 carriers. Shipping experience is personal.
emphasis.systems: Few interfaces — shop, accounting, shipping labels are enough at the start.
emphasis.migration: Cut-over weekend, clear freeze date, 2 weeks hypercare.
emphasis.payment: 3-5 providers are enough. Prepayment + Klarna + PayPal as standard.

tasks.title: Logo + document footer
tasks.hint: Logo (SVG/PNG) + T&C footer for order confirmation · delivery note · invoice · dunning

tasks.title: Shop integration
tasks.hint: API keys/webhook URL from your own shop (Shopify · Woo · JTL · Magento)

tasks.title: Master-data CSV
tasks.hint: Products + images + mandatory fields shop-ready

tasks.title: Shipping + label printer
tasks.hint: 1-2 carriers (DHL/DPD/UPS) + label printer for pick & pack

tasks.title: Approve email templates
tasks.hint: Order confirmation · shipping · returns · customer inquiry

tasks.title: SMTP + SPF/DKIM
tasks.hint: Mailbox + DNS records so documents don't land in spam

tasks.title: Bank login (FinAPI/EBICS)
tasks.hint: Daily reconciliation + open-item matching automatic

tasks.title: DATEV tax-advisor access
tasks.hint: Advisor no. + client no. forwarded to tax advisor

tasks.title: Test user warehouse/accounting
tasks.hint: For role-specific training

tasks.title: Plan training sessions
tasks.hint: One session per role before go-live is usually enough

tasks.title: Confirm go-live date
tasks.hint: Cut-over weekend · freeze date · 2 weeks hypercare
